---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or endpoint for Rescope
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem you're trying to solve. What's missing or painful?

## Proposed Solution

How you'd like it to work. Include example API calls if relevant.

## Descope API Reference

If this relates to an existing Descope API endpoint, link to the relevant documentation:
- https://docs.descope.com/api/...

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples.
